local.skip_reason: Canonical R worker integration requires Linux

retained_failed_ci_attempts.reason: The harness waited for the P009 Analysis complete state after the real calculation had reached the valid P008 result boundary.
All substantive checks passed; one exact-text selector rejected the second sentence inside a two-sentence P009 handoff notice.

replay.working_directory: Fresh remote no-hardlinks detached macOS clone plus GitHub Actions Ubuntu 24.04 checkout of exact commit 7e9a28eafa4756b2cf82e6d6f3d8e0c43742edf5
replay.command: ./scripts/bootstrap.sh; ./scripts/verify.sh; uv run python scripts/browser_audit_p008.py --output /tmp/delta-p008-browser-audit; docker build --platform linux/amd64 --file containers/Dockerfile .
limitations: The macOS clean clone may reuse package-manager caches and cannot execute the canonical Linux worker boundary.
The GitHub-hosted runner image is named but is not represented by an immutable runner-image digest.
Browser screenshots and the temporary audit JSON remain in the ephemeral GitHub runner; the full JSON is retained in the GitHub job log because repository artifact quota was unavailable.
The browser gate covers the exposed four-cell Guided whole-text slice, not all three research purposes or known/unknown variants required for full P008 completion.
Synthetic workflow evidence does not establish general usability, benchmark accuracy, literary findings, FAIR certification, production readiness, or release acceptance.

notes: The exact P008 minimum-alpha implementation passed local and fresh remote clean-clone verification, canonical Linux source and container gates, and a real upload-to-R/stylo browser workflow. Two preceding CI failures are retained as harness-boundary corrections. Full P008 remains open for all-purpose and known/unknown workflow evidence plus the human-accepted Research preset.
